quote: Waste no more time arguing what a good man should be. Be one.
author: Marcus Aurelius

quote: He who has a why to live can bear almost any how.
author: Friedrich Nietzsche

quote: Well done is better than well said.
author: Benjamin Franklin

quote: A journey of a thousand miles begins with a single step.
author: Lao Tzu

quote: No great thing is created suddenly.
author: Epictetus

quote: He has half the deed done who has made a beginning.
author: Horace

quote: The best way out is always through.
author: Robert Frost

quote: All that we are is the result of what we have thought.
author: The Buddha

quote: The most dangerous phrase is, 'We've always done it this way.'
author: Grace Hopper

quote: Pray not for lighter burdens, but for stronger backs.
author: Phillips Brooks

quote: Do what you can, with what you have, where you are.
author: Theodore Roosevelt

quote: Act as if what you do makes a difference. It does.
author: William James

quote: Nothing will work unless you do.
author: Maya Angelou

quote: Fortune favors the bold.
author: Virgil

quote: Energy and persistence conquer all things.
author: Benjamin Franklin

quote: The secret of getting ahead is getting started.
author: Mark Twain

quote: What we think, we become.
author: The Buddha

quote: Happiness depends upon ourselves.
author: Aristotle

quote: He who conquers himself is the mightiest warrior.
author: Confucius

quote: It does not matter how slowly you go as long as you do not stop.
author: Confucius

quote: Our greatest glory is not in never falling, but in rising every time we fall.
author: Confucius

quote: Knowing yourself is the beginning of all wisdom.
author: Aristotle

quote: The harder the conflict, the greater the triumph.
author: George Washington

quote: I am not afraid... I was born to do this.
author: Joan of Arc

quote: What lies behind us and what lies before us are tiny matters compared to what lies within us.
author: Ralph Waldo Emerson

quote: Build your own dreams, or someone else will hire you to build theirs.
author: Farrah Gray

quote: The future depends on what you do today.
author: Mahatma Gandhi

quote: Be yourself; everyone else is already taken.
author: Oscar Wilde

quote: What you do speaks so loudly that I cannot hear what you say.
author: Ralph Waldo Emerson

quote: The only way to do great work is to love what you do.
author: Steve Jobs

quote: Whether you think you can or you think you can't, you're right.
author: Henry Ford

quote: Do the thing and you will have the power.
author: Ralph Waldo Emerson

quote: We are what we repeatedly do. Excellence, then, is not an act, but a habit.
author: Aristotle

quote: Courage is grace under pressure.
author: Ernest Hemingway

quote: Success is walking from failure to failure with no loss of enthusiasm.
author: Winston Churchill

quote: If you're going through hell, keep going.
author: Winston Churchill

quote: The future belongs to those who believe in the beauty of their dreams.
author: Eleanor Roosevelt

quote: No one can make you feel inferior without your consent.
author: Eleanor Roosevelt

quote: Optimism is the faith that leads to achievement.
author: Helen Keller

quote: Life is either a daring adventure or nothing.
author: Helen Keller

quote: Try not to become a man of success, but rather become a man of value.
author: Albert Einstein

quote: In the middle of difficulty lies opportunity.
author: Albert Einstein

quote: Genius is one percent inspiration and ninety-nine percent perspiration.
author: Thomas Edison

quote: Our greatest weakness lies in giving up.
author: Thomas Edison

quote: The way to get started is to quit talking and begin doing.
author: Walt Disney

quote: If you can dream it, you can do it.
author: Walt Disney

quote: Leap, and the net will appear.
author: John Burroughs

quote: Dream big and dare to fail.
author: Norman Vaughan

quote: Never, never, never give up.
author: Winston Churchill

quote: The obstacle is the way.
author: Marcus Aurelius

quote: Man cannot discover new oceans unless he has the courage to lose sight of the shore.
author: Andre Gide

quote: You miss 100% of the shots you don't take.
author: Wayne Gretzky

quote: Do one thing every day that scares you.
author: Eleanor Roosevelt

quote: Go confidently in the direction of your dreams.
author: Henry David Thoreau

quote: If opportunity doesn't knock, build a door.
author: Milton Berle

quote: It always seems impossible until it's done.
author: Nelson Mandela

quote: Perfection is not attainable, but if we chase perfection we can catch excellence.
author: Vince Lombardi

quote: Success usually comes to those who are too busy to be looking for it.
author: Henry David Thoreau

quote: What you get by achieving your goals is not as important as what you become.
author: Zig Ziglar

quote: Believe you can and you're halfway there.
author: Theodore Roosevelt

quote: The only limit to our realization of tomorrow is our doubts of today.
author: Franklin D. Roosevelt

quote: Do not wait to strike till the iron is hot; but make it hot by striking.
author: William Butler Yeats

quote: Everything you've ever wanted is on the other side of fear.
author: George Addair

quote: Fall seven times and stand up eight.
author: Japanese Proverb

quote: If you want to lift yourself up, lift up someone else.
author: Booker T. Washington

quote: Either you run the day or the day runs you.
author: Jim Rohn

quote: Discipline is the bridge between goals and accomplishment.
author: Jim Rohn

quote: Don't wish it were easier; wish you were better.
author: Jim Rohn

quote: Motivation is what gets you started. Habit is what keeps you going.
author: Jim Rohn

quote: For things to change, you have to change.
author: Jim Rohn

quote: Work harder on yourself than you do on your job.
author: Jim Rohn

quote: Formal education will make you a living; self-education will make you a fortune.
author: Jim Rohn

quote: Take care of your body. It's the only place you have to live.
author: Jim Rohn

quote: Learn to work harder on yourself than you do on your job.
author: Jim Rohn

quote: Days are expensive. When you spend a day, you have one less day to spend.
author: Jim Rohn

quote: The only person you are destined to become is the person you decide to be.
author: Ralph Waldo Emerson

quote: Don't count the days, make the days count.
author: Muhammad Ali

quote: A year from now you may wish you had started today.
author: Karen Lamb

quote: Never let the fear of striking out keep you from playing the game.
author: Babe Ruth

quote: If there is no struggle, there is no progress.
author: Frederick Douglass

quote: Do not pray for an easy life; pray for the strength to endure a difficult one.
author: Bruce Lee

quote: What matters most is how well you walk through the fire.
author: Charles Bukowski

quote: Turn your wounds into wisdom.
author: Oprah Winfrey

quote: Action is the foundational key to all success.
author: Pablo Picasso

quote: Everything has beauty, but not everyone sees it.
author: Confucius

quote: The man who moves a mountain begins by carrying away small stones.
author: Confucius

quote: The only true wisdom is in knowing you know nothing.
author: Socrates

quote: He who is brave is free.
author: Seneca

quote: Luck is what happens when preparation meets opportunity.
author: Seneca

quote: As long as you live, keep learning how to live.
author: Seneca

quote: Difficulties strengthen the mind, as labor does the body.
author: Seneca

quote: First say to yourself what you would be; then do what you have to do.
author: Epictetus

quote: No man is free who is not master of himself.
author: Epictetus

quote: Make the best use of what is in your power, and take the rest as it happens.
author: Epictetus

quote: If it is not right, do not do it; if it is not true, do not say it.
author: Marcus Aurelius

quote: You have power over your mind—not outside events.
author: Marcus Aurelius

quote: The happiness of your life depends upon the quality of your thoughts.
author: Marcus Aurelius

quote: Confine yourself to the present.
author: Marcus Aurelius

quote: Waste no more time arguing about what a good man should be. Be one.
author: Marcus Aurelius

quote: To be everywhere is to be nowhere.
author: Seneca
